title: SFMC Developer
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Your Role**
 As an SFMC Developer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and optimizing marketing automation solutions within the Salesforce Marketing Cloud ecosystem. You will collaborate with cross\\-functional business, marketing, and technical teams to deliver scalable, data‑driven customer journeys that enhance engagement and elevate overall customer experience.
   

  

**In this role, you will play a key role in:**
* Developing and deploying custom SFMC solutions including email templates, landing pages, automations, and journeys.
* Building scalable and reusable components using AMPscript, SSJS, and SQL within Marketing Cloud.
* Implementing and optimizing Journey Builder workflows and multi‑channel campaigns (email, SMS, push).
* Integrating SFMC with Salesforce CRM and other external systems using APIs, data extensions, and automation studio.
* Ensuring data hygiene, segmentation accuracy, and personalization across campaigns.
* Participating in code reviews, solution design discussions, and production support activities.
* Monitoring platform performance, debugging issues, and ensuring best‑practice security and governance.


**Your Profile**
* Salesforce certifications (e.g., Marketing Cloud Email Specialist, Administrator, Developer).
* Experience with MobilePush, CloudPages, and distributed/enterprise BUs.
* Exposure to CDP/RTCDP, GA4/analytics stacks, and event streaming (e.g., Segment).
* Knowledge of serverless functions, middleware (Mulesoft), or customer data platforms.
* Experience in highly regulated industries (finance, healthcare, telecom) and localization at scale.


 Top 5 Technical Skills
   

  

* AMPscript \\& SSJS
+ Personalization, dynamic content, and scripted automations/CloudPages.

* SQL for SFMC (Automation Studio / Query Activities)
+ Audience segmentation, transformations, deduplication, and performance tuning.

* Journey Builder \\& Automation Studio
+ End\\-to\\-end campaign design, event\\-driven journeys, error handling, and reusability.

* APIs \\& Integrations (REST/SOAP, MC Connect)
+ Data sync with CRM and external systems, token management, and integration reliability.

* Email/Mobile Engineering \\& Deliverability
+ Modular HTML/CSS email coding, device/client rendering, IP warm\\-up, and compliance.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is an AI\\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\\-to\\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\\.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real \\| www.capgemini.com

title: SDET and Devops
description:
**Company Description**

 Ati Motors specializes in developing autonomous electric vehicles designed for material movement in industrial settings, such as factories and warehouses. These vehicles operate both indoors and outdoors, offering innovative solutions to improve efficiency and productivity. By leveraging advanced technology, Ati Motors is at the forefront of automation in industrial environments. The company's mission is to transform traditional material movement through cutting\\-edge autonomous systems.
   




**Role Description**

 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site role in Bengaluru for a Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET) and DevOps professional. The role involves designing, implementing, and maintaining testing frameworks for software products. You will be responsible for creating automated tests, integrating continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipelines, and ensuring robust quality assurance processes. Collaboration with cross\\-functional teams, troubleshooting software issues, and developing tools to streamline development and testing workflows are key aspects of this position.
   




**Qualifications**
* Strong knowledge of Computer Science fundamentals, including data structures and algorithms
* Proficiency in Software Development, Programming, and Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP)
* Experience in Back\\-End Web Development and building scalable applications
* Ability to design and implement automated test frameworks and ensure high\\-quality code
* Familiarity with DevOps principles and tools, including CI/CD pipelines
* Excellent problem\\-solving and debugging skills
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
* Experience with industrial automation or autonomous systems is a plus

title: Full stack builder(Intern)
job_function: General Business, Management, and Business Development
description:
**Full Stack Builder (Intern)**
 Build systems that help people hear again.
   

  

 Open Hearing · Bangalore (US time zone overlap) · 12 Months · ₹30,000/month · PPO
   

  

**Rebuilding Tech for Hearing Care From Scratch**
 1\\.5 billion people worldwide live with hearing loss. Over 430 million need rehabilitation but aren’t receiving it and by 2050, this will affect 2\\.5 billion.
   

  

 Not because solutions don't exist \\- but because providers are buried under multiple tabs, paper workflows, and systems that don't talk to each other. Millions go untreated while clinicians fight their own tools.
   

  

 We're fixing this.
   

  

 Open Hearing is one AI\\-native operating system for hearing care \\- so every minute clawed back from the provider is a minute back with patients. Scale follows when the provider isn't the bottleneck.
   

  

 We already live in clinics. Now we’re building the team that takes this to millions.
   

  

 If we get this right, people hear again.
   

  

**About the Team**
 Open Hearing was founded by Harvard MBAs (Raghav and Kenneth) with firsthand experience building and scaling B2B and B2C unicorns in India. We’re backed by some of the most prominent names in U.S. hearing care, including the most successful software founder in the category and the president of one of the world’s largest professional organizations for hearing healthcare professionals.
   

  

**What This Role Is (and Isn’t)**
 This is not a “learn and observe” internship.
   

 This is identifying problems → turning them into products → shipping to production → iterating based on real usage.
   

**You are here to own outcomes, not tasks.**
**What You’ll Actually Do**
 You won’t be working on dummy problems. You will:
   

* Turn ambiguous ideas into shipped products \\- from patient scheduling tools to provider dashboards
* Create AI\\-powered workflows \\- e.g.assists providers from note\\-taking to patient recommendations in real time
* Ship → observe → iterate continuously \\- read logs, talk to users, spot friction, fix it
* Make systems faster, simpler, and more reliable \\- in healthcare, reliability isn’t optional


**Real impact. Real feedback. Real consequences.**
**Tech Stack**
 Frontend: React.js, JavaScript (ES6\\+), Typescript
   

 Backend: Java, Spring Boot
   

 Database: PostgreSQL
   

 Others: AWS, Pulumi, Dify, Deepgram, Livekit
   

  

 We don’t hire for specific tools \\- we care about fundamentals, problem\\-solving, and how you build.
   

  

**Who You Are**
* 3rd year Engineering student (2027 passouts)
* You’ve built real things \\- side projects, hackathons, tools beyond coursework
* You can explain why you built something a certain way, not just what you built
* Curious about AI/LLMs in real\\-world systems \\- not just the hype, but the hard parts
* You care about users and outcomes, not just code.


**You’re a builder, not just a developer**
**What a Strong Application Looks Like**
 We don’t care about resumes as much as we care about thinking. A strong application shows:
   

* A project you built end\\-to\\-end
* Clear reasoning and trade\\-offs behind your decisions


**Bonus** 
 : You’ve experimented with AI/LLMs or shipped something people actually used.
   

  

**Show us how you think.**
**What You Get**
* Work that actually matters \\- every system you ship gets closer to restoring hearing
* Ownership from day one \\- own features end\\-to\\-end
* Real\\-world systems \\- production traffic, real users, real constraints
* Direct access to founders \\- see how product decisions are made
* PPO based on performance \\- a 12\\-month path to a full\\-time role


**How to Apply**
 This role is intense.
 **Six days a week.** 
 You’ll deal with ambiguity, ship before you feel ready, and break things under pressure. This is not for everyone \\- and that’s okay.
   

  

 Fill out the application form:
 **Apply Here**
 Take your time. We care more about clarity of thought than credentials.
   

 If this excites you \\- apply.

title: Senior Performance Test Engineer
description:
**Job Description**
 As Performance test engineer you focus on the validation of the performance aspect (response timers, peak load) of applications. You are involved in the automated verification and validation of the performance aspect of system under test.
   

  

**Job Description \\- Grade Specific**
 You are a leading QA Performance Specialist who can set up a complete performance test automation solution at concept level. Your clear vision allows you to persuade colleagues and customers with valid arguments. As Performance Test Specialist you have in depth knowledge of at least one expertise in the field of test automation tools and techniques. This knowledge enables you to engage in the automated verification and validation of products that engineers have developed.

title: Software Development Engineer 2, Finance Automation
description:
**Description**
 Interested in building the next generation of operational platforms that power complex workflows across thousands of internal and external users? Interested in designing highly scalable systems that leverage the full power of Amazon Cloud?
   

  

 Massive data volume \\+ complex business rules in a highly distributed and service\\-oriented architecture \\= a world\\-class automation and workflow management challenge. We are looking for a talented and self\\-driven individual to join our team. In this role, you will design, build, and own features that advance our platform — from intelligent automation and workflow optimization to cross\\-org integrations. You will operate with a high degree of autonomy, taking end\\-to\\-end ownership of complex technical problems while collaborating with a small, high\\-performing team.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will draw upon exemplary analytical, critical thinking, and problem\\-solving skills, deep software development experience, and a passion for creating maintainable, highly reliable, and scalable systems accessed by thousands of internal customers and cross\\-functional stakeholders. Successful members of this team collaborate effectively with internal customers and dependent development teams across Amazon to deliver new capabilities against high operational standards of system availability and reliability. In the space of workflow management and automation tools, engineers on this team solve problems for the first time and have the opportunity to convert solutions into generic, reusable components for the broader engineering community. We look for engineers who are excellent communicators, self\\-motivated, flexible, hardworking, and who like to have fun. This candidate also plays an active role in reviewing technical designs from the team and in mentoring other developers.
   

  

 You will have the opportunity to play a key role in building new software products and features from the ground up. Your work will allow you to utilize a melting pot of technologies, programming languages, and systems — and require you to keep up with the ever\\-changing technological landscape. Your responsibilities will include all aspects of software development, with the freedom and encouragement to explore your own ideas and the reward of seeing your contributions benefit Amazon worldwide. Our team is looking for a talented software development engineer who can tackle large, complex projects and drive meaningful impact at scale.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Working collaboratively, shape the vision and strategy for solving business problems spread across retail and other cross systems outside of retail
* Develop an architecture, thinking long term about futuristic needs.
* Mentor, grow, and share the journey to deliver with quality.
* Deep dive, develop and deliver systems that are highly maintainable. Technical leader for the team with the ability to deliver against all odds.
* Data driven approach for making right architecture decisions, managing business priorities


 A day in the life
   

  

 As a software development engineer on this team, you will play a pivotal role in the following:
   

  

* Work with the team and stakeholders to help drive business decisions.
* Design, implement, test, deploy, and maintain innovative software solutions to drive service optimization, cost, and security.
* Use software engineering best practices to ensure a high standard of quality for all of the team deliverables
* Write high\\-quality distributed system software
* Work in an agile, startup\\-like development environment, where you are always working on the most important stuff.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of non\\-internship professional software development experience
* 2\\+ years of non\\-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
* Experience programming with at least one software programming language


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience
* Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\\-we\\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \\- ADCI HYD 13 SEZ
   

  

 Job ID: A10383229
